meta.description: Average COFP token cost per country/territory in local fiat currency. Used by the Coffee Pie® backend to display localized pricing in the Provider settlement panel.
meta.unit: 1 COFP = 1 Coffee Pie® Slice·min (1 Slice served for 1 minute)

base_reference.note: Reference price set by community governance vote. All other costs are derived from this base via approximate exchange rates.

meta.exchange_rate_note: All costs are approximate, derived from 1 COFP = 0.29 COP ≈ 0.00008286 USD at 3,500 COP/USD. Exchange rates are indicative (2025–2026 averages). Actual Provider settlement amounts are recalculated at the time of each fiat withdrawal request using a live governance-approved rate oracle. Regional pricing may be further adjusted by local provider governance votes.
meta.tier_note: The fiat amount a Provider receives per COFP = cost × (1 + tier_margin). See coffeepie.co/proveedores-nube for Tier I–V requirements and margins.

countries.name: Argentina
countries.note: Highly volatile; rate subject to frequent revision by governance oracle.

countries.name: Colombia
countries.note: Reference base price set by governance vote.

countries.name: Cuba
countries.note: Official rate used; actual market rate may differ significantly.

countries.name: Iran
countries.note: Official rate used; open-market rate is significantly higher (~580,000 IRR/USD). Governance oracle must use verified rate.

countries.name: Korea, North
countries.note: Official rate used; currency not freely convertible. Provider settlement unavailable.

countries.name: Lebanon
countries.note: Ongoing economic crisis; market rate used (~90,000 LBP/USD). Highly volatile; governance oracle must use live rate.

countries.name: Myanmar
countries.note: Official rate used; open-market rate differs due to political situation.

countries.name: Saint Helena, Ascension and Tristan da Cunha
South Georgia and the South Sandwich Islands
Sudan
countries.note: Ongoing conflict; rate subject to high volatility.

countries.name: Syria
countries.note: Official rate used; actual rate differs significantly due to conflict. Provider settlement may be restricted.

countries.name: Venezuela
countries.note: Highly volatile; governance oracle must use live rate from BCV or market reference.

countries.name: Zimbabwe
countries.note: Zimbabwe Gold (ZiG) introduced April 2024; USD also widely accepted. Rate subject to revision.
